question_text: What is power defined as in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of energy used by an appliance

options.label: B
options.text: The rate at which energy is transferred or used

options.label: C
options.text: The time taken for an appliance to use energy

options.label: D
options.text: The force applied to move an object

explanation: Power tells us how fast energy is being transferred or used. A higher power means energy is transferred more quickly. It's the rate of energy transfer, not the total amount or the time taken.
